name: sma-core-vscode
description: SMA orchestration engine embedded in VS Code (ADR-1239 IDE profile).

chatParticipants.name: sma
chatParticipants.description: Invoke SMA orchestration commands from chat.

languageModelTools.name: sma_progress
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Reports SMA milestone/phase progress (percent complete, plan and summary counts) for the current project.

languageModelTools.name: sma_workstreams
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Lists the SMA parallel workstreams for the current project (or reports flat/single-workstream mode).

languageModelTools.name: sma_plan_phase
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Looks up the plan index (plans, waves, checkpoints) for a named SMA phase. Read-only — does not create or modify a phase plan; use the /sma-plan-phase chat workflow for full phase planning.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Look up a SMA phase's plan index.

phase.description: The SMA phase name to look up (e.g. "01-core").
